title: gossypium herbaceum subsp. africanum
intro:
Gossypium herbaceum subsp. africanum, also known as African cotton or wild cotton, is a subspecies of the Gossypium herbaceum plant, a perennial shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues.

The health benefits of Gossypium herbaceum subsp. africanum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. The plant's leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
